fields.description: Master switch. When off, balances are not refreshed and the Bank Balances widget shows a disabled notice.
fields.label: Enable Plaid Bank Balances

fields.description: Sandbox uses Plaid test credentials (user_good / pass_good). Real KeyBank data requires Production access (an approval step in the Plaid dashboard) and re-running Connect Bank.
fields.label: Environment

fields.description: Optional. Company these accounts belong to (for labelling).
fields.label: Company
Status
fields.options:
Not Connected
Connected
Error
Reconnect Required

fields.description: Plaid client_id (an identifier, sent in every request).
fields.label: Client ID

fields.description: Plaid secret for the selected environment. Stored encrypted.
fields.label: Secret

fields.description: How often (minutes) the scheduled job may refresh balances. Balances change slowly, so ~240 (4h) keeps Plaid calls low.
fields.label: Refresh Throttle (Minutes)

fields.description: Long-lived Plaid access token, set after Connect Bank. Stored encrypted; never displayed.
fields.label: Access Token

fields.description: Set when Plaid reports a non-retryable error (e.g. login required, bad keys). While set, the scheduler stops refreshing so a dead connection can't storm the API. Cleared automatically when you edit credentials or reconnect successfully.
fields.label: Auth Blocked (Paused)
